bio: Assalamu alaikum. I work in NHS administration and find purpose in serving my community. I love reading, cooking Somali food, and attending Islamic lectures. Looking for a grounded, family-oriented partner.
I teach primary school in Manchester and find it incredibly rewarding. My faith is central to my life and I am actively working on becoming a better Muslim. I enjoy cooking, reading, and family time.
Currently completing a PhD in biochemistry alhamdulillah. I am passionate about my research and my deen in equal measure. I love hiking, reading Islamic history, and hosting family gatherings.
I am a pharmacist with a warm personality and a quiet ambition. After a difficult chapter I am hopeful and ready for a new beginning. I value honesty, kindness, and a shared commitment to deen.

Newly qualified solicitor based in East London. I am ambitious but grounded — my family and faith keep me centred. I enjoy reading, travelling with family, and volunteering. Looking for a kind, practising partner.

Alhamdulillah working as a hospital doctor in London. My work, my family, and my faith are my three pillars. I enjoy reading, cooking Somali food, and outdoor running. Looking for a practising, homely partner.
Civil engineer working on infrastructure projects across the Midlands. I am hardworking, family-focused, and deeply value my deen. I enjoy football, reading, and helping at the local masjid.

I teach secondary school in Manchester and genuinely love it. Outside school I enjoy reading Islamic books, cooking, and spending time with my family. Seeking a sincere, practising partner with good character.

Chartered accountant in Leicester — established and settled alhamdulillah. I have a relaxed, friendly nature and am close to my family. I enjoy cricket, hiking, and learning new skills in my spare time.
